text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I've started collecting<n>five-hundred-yen
coins. I'm saving up for<n>a motorcycle.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Still don't know which one I want<n>though. They're
all so damn cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Something American would be sweet as<n>hell, but
soaring down the roads in a<n>liter bike sounds
great too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh, I can't wait! I'll take you for a<n>ride when I
finally get one!
